series_metadata.series_description: The Subrogation Form Letters are requests made by the subrogation department to various parties involved requesting information on subrogation claims. These forms are used to gather facts on injuries and locate potential at-fault parties and insurance coverage. The Subrogation Form Letters are scanned into a secure online repository. The secured online repository is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain the original document in the Subrogation Unit after scanned in a secure online repository, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in a secure online repository, keep for a period of 10 years after the Full and Final Subrogation Agreement is received and case is closed, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
